seoTitle: Jotform Beginner Tutorial: How to Use Jotform
metaDescription: A beginner's walkthrough of Jotform covering how to build your first form, add fields, and use its newer AI-assisted features.
intro: Jotform has grown well beyond simple contact forms, now offering AI tools that speed up form building and response handling. This beginner tutorial covers the basics of creating a form and where the AI features fit into that process.

steps.heading: Create a new form
steps.body: Start from a blank form or a template inside Jotform's builder to set up the basic structure you'll be working with.

steps.heading: Add and arrange fields
steps.body: Drag in the fields you need, such as text, email, file upload, or multiple choice, and arrange them in a logical order.

steps.heading: Try the AI form generator
steps.body: Use Jotform's AI-assisted tools to generate a starting form from a text prompt, then refine the fields it produces.

steps.heading: Customize the design
steps.body: Adjust colors, fonts, and layout so the form matches your brand before sharing it.

steps.heading: Publish and share the form
steps.body: Publish the form and share it via link, embed, or QR code, then check how responses come in through Jotform's dashboard.

faq.question: Is Jotform free to use for beginners?
faq.answer: Jotform offers a free plan with limited submissions and forms, which is enough for testing the basics before upgrading.

faq.question: What do Jotform's AI features actually do?
faq.answer: They help generate form structures from prompts and can assist with summarizing or organizing submitted responses.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to build a form?
faq.answer: No, Jotform is built as a drag-and-drop tool, so no coding is required for standard forms.

faq.question: Can I embed a Jotform form on my own website?
faq.answer: Yes, Jotform provides embed code so forms can be placed directly on an existing website.
